name: Can I get fired for filing hearing loss comp?

mainEntity.name: Can I get fired for filing hearing loss comp?

acceptedAnswer.description:
**No, retaliation illegal under workers' comp laws; document any adverse actions.**

Protected activity; sue for wrongful termination if occurs.[1][8]

**Key factors:**
- Timing post-filing.
- Performance records.
- Witness retaliation.
- State anti-retaliation statutes.

Report to labor board; attorney files charge.[2] Deters employers.

Your job safeguarded.
